title: Crystal Sphere
description:
[sine][blue]"I predicted you'd enter...!"[/blue][/sine]

A [jitter]raspy[/jitter] voice calls out as you enter a [purple]mystic hut[/purple].

[sine][blue]"Your destiny has brought you here. We must uncover your future and fortunes so you can SAVE US ALL!!"[/blue][/sine]
"Okay, here are the options for the [gold]Crystal Sphere reading[/gold]. Be sure to sign this waiver as well," she says while bringing out pen and parchment.
conditions: All players have at least 100 Gold
Act 2 or later (based on player's chosen act order)
notes: Crystal Sphere is a minigame event where both options launch a [purple]Divination[/purple] session. The [gold]Uncover Future[/gold] option costs 51-99 Gold (50 base + 1-49 random) to reveal 3 tiles and claim their rewards. The [gold]Payment Plan[/gold] option adds a [red]Debt[/red] curse to your deck but grants 6 divinations instead. The gold cost is randomized each time the event is offered. This event is non-deterministic.
